title: Churchill, Jo - Minister of State, Department for Work and Pensions - ACOBA advice
body: "Ms Churchill left her role at the Department for Work and Pensions in July 2024.  Ambassador, Cambridge Children’s Hospital  Jo Churchill sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Cambridge Children’s Hospital. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in October 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Ambassador, Eastern Education Group  Jo Churchill sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Eastern Education Group. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in October 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Business Services Support, South Lincolnshire Scaffolding  Jo Churchill sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with South Lincolnshire Scaffolding. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent June 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
